NVDA.reasoning: Branch B fires weakly; Branch A does not cleanly fire. BRANCH A (Fade the Extreme): Daily RSI(21)=81.52 and RSI(14)=74.76 are elevated, but z-score at 1.92 falls just short of the +2.0 threshold. Bollinger %B=0.7824 places price inside the bands (upper band at $220.24 vs current $209.25), so no BB extreme. No RSI divergence detected. Hourly RSI=51.94 is neutral — the daily/hourly extreme divergence required for a high-conviction fade is absent. ADX=54.67 with plus_DI=39.03 vs minus_DI=4.66 signals an exceptionally strong trend, making a fade especially dangerous. Wiki context confirms the prior z-score was 2.39 (higher) and has since cooled to 1.92, suggesting the extension already absorbed some selling — a repeat fade at a lower reading is lower-conviction. Branch A: does not fire. BRANCH B (Buy the Dip in Trend): Full daily EMA alignment confirmed (ema_aligned_uptrend=true), ADX=54.67 — trend structure is unambiguous. NVDA pulled back from the 216.83 swing high to 209.25 over three sessions. On the hourly Fibonacci (swing high 216.82 / swing low 198.19), the 38.2% retracement sits at $209.70 — current price $209.25 is testing this level. The hourly pivot low at $208.20 (15 tests, volume-confirmed) provides horizontal support confluence with the 38.2% Fib, a textbook Branch B confluence zone. Hourly volume bias is 'down' (relative volume 0.56) — healthy declining volume on the pullback, not a distribution signal. The wiki constructive zone is $204–$208, so the ideal entry is marginally lower; hourly RSI=51.94 has not reached the <35 oversold confirmation target, reducing conviction. However, the Fib+support confluence at $208.20–$209.70 is real. Branch B fires weakly. RISK NOTES: The 3-day pullback from $216.83 is still shallow (only to the 38.2% level); if $208.20 support breaks, the 50% retracement at $207.50 and 61.8% at $205.30 are next logical supports. Stop placed below the 61.8% hourly Fib ($205.30) to give the setup room without excessive drawdown. Target is retest of the $216.83 recent swing high. Risk/reward: entry $209.25, target $216.83 (+3.6%), stop $205.30 (-1.9%), RR ~1.9:1 — acceptable but not exceptional for a mean reversion setup.
